source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v12 — окончательная квалификация microstructure-route
goal: Классифицировать microstructure-сигнал в один из трёх честных статусов: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, или watchlist/reject — через строгие parallel-free track-ветки поверх immutable reference active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Immutable reference active-signal-v1@1: never modify, never retune, never change its hours/days/thresholds/execution.
All key decisions use only @1 as base reference; @3 is auxiliary comparison only, never a decision base.
Overlay and replacement are separate products: never mix them in the same narrative or run.
Simple rules first: bucket → threshold → quantile before any logistic or CatBoost.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox.
Same-window truth: every critical comparison must run on the identical evaluation window.
No new data families, model families, or macro routes until microstructure qualification is complete.
Short/long/combined must all be tested explicitly; no short-only conclusions.
No opening new research directions until v12 reaches final verdict.

stages.title: Freeze terminology and correction log
stages.objective: Open v12 research project with corrected terminology: v11 result is DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, v10 was mischaracterized as model-based overlay when it was actually rule-based replacement candidate.
actions: Open new research_project for v12.
Record in research_memory: v11 downgraded to watchlist, v10 mischaracterized.
Freeze immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Create research_map axes: track, side, route_type, threshold_origin, comparison_window, final_decision.

Create open-items register for all v12 deliverables: true_overlay_track, replacement_track, threshold_provenance, same_window_ref1_runs, short_long_combined_split, cannibalization_audit, model_need_assessment, final_v12_verdict.
success_criteria: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and frozen reference.
Research map axes defined.
Open-items register created.

stages.title: Rebuild exact base @1 comparison frame
stages.objective: Run the immutable base snapshot active-signal-v1@1 on the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11 to establish the single canonical reference run for all v12 comparisons.
actions: Inspect exact base snapshot @1 via backtests_strategy.
Freeze the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11.
Run immutable base @1 on that window via backtests_runs.
Extract and store: trades list, timestamps, side split, PnL, profit factor, max drawdown, win rate.
Save this run as the single canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run for all v12 comparisons.
success_criteria: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with full trade-level detail.
Lockbox window explicitly documented.

stages.title: Threshold provenance and selection discipline
stages.objective: Replace v11 hand-tuned thresholds with a disciplined selection procedure: define candidate threshold families, split selection vs lockbox windows, choose up to 3 frozen threshold sets before any lockbox rerun.
actions: Define candidate threshold families for cf_micro_imbalance_1h: quantile-based, fixed numeric, symmetric, asymmetric.
Split windows: threshold selection window vs lockbox verification window.
On selection window, choose at most 3 candidate threshold sets: conservative, balanced, aggressive.
Freeze all thresholds before any lockbox rerun.
Document provenance of every threshold in research_memory.
success_criteria: Frozen threshold sets with documented provenance exist.
Each threshold has origin_type, selection_window_used, cutoff_long, cutoff_short recorded.

stages.title: Build true overlay implementation over @1
stages.objective: Construct true overlay variants where microstructure acts only as allow/block gate on base @1 signals — base signal IDs and entry logic are preserved, no retroactive replacement.
actions: Build true overlay variant: base signal IDs and entry logic unchanged, microstructure only as veto/filter.
Create three separate overlay snapshots: short-only, long-only, combined.
Validate at snapshot level: signal IDs preserved, entry timing preserved, blocking only at decision moment, no replacement.
Save three separate overlay snapshots.
success_criteria: Three true-overlay snapshots exist (short, long, combined).
Each passes validation: base_signal_ids_preserved, causal_blocking_ok, replacement_absent.

stages.title: Simple-rule overlay tests on selection window
stages.objective: Run each frozen threshold set against the selection window for all three overlay variants to determine whether true overlay shows any signal before committing to lockbox testing.
actions: For each frozen threshold set, run on selection window: short-only overlay, long-only overlay, combined overlay.
Compute per-variant: delta PnL vs base, delta PF, delta DD, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, veto precision.
Apply promotion rule: only variants with meaningful delta, not cutting too many winners, no coverage collapse proceed to lockbox.
success_criteria: Shortlist of true-overlay candidates promoted to lockbox testing.
Each candidate has full selection-window metrics documented.

stages.title: True overlay lockbox test against base @1
stages.objective: Run surviving true-overlay candidates on the exact same lockbox window against base @1 to get the definitive answer on whether microstructure works as a real overlay.
actions: For each surviving overlay candidate, run on lockbox window: base @1, base @1 + short-only overlay, base @1 + long-only overlay, base @1 + combined overlay.
Compute: trades, PnL, PF, DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, ownership of improvement.
Record final verdict for true-overlay track.
success_criteria: Final verdict on true-overlay track: confirmed, watchlist, or rejected.
Full lockbox comparison table against base @1 documented.

stages.title: Honest replacement track vs base @1
stages.objective: If overlay is weak or impossible, honestly test microstructure as a standalone replacement signal layer — new signal, new snapshot, honest comparison against @1, no claim of being a filter.
actions: Build separate replacement snapshots: short-only, long-only, combined.
Document for each: exact signal logic, threshold logic, difference from base, explicit statement 'not overlay'.
Run all replacement variants against base @1 on the same lockbox window.
Compute: trades, pnl_delta, pf_delta, dd_delta, overlap_with_base, better_than_ref1.
success_criteria: Final verdict on replacement track: confirmed, watchlist, or rejected.
Full comparison table against base @1 documented.
stages.gate_hint: Executed only if overlay track does not produce CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY; may be skipped if overlay is confirmed strong.

stages.title: Cannibalization, ownership and regime analysis
stages.objective: Audit all surviving variants from both tracks for cannibalization: are we removing bad trades or killing profitable clusters, and which regimes benefit or suffer.
actions: For all surviving overlay and replacement variants compute: removed losers share, removed winners share, PnL of removed trades.
Compute regime-level: strongest improved regime, weakest affected regime, weak-window repair, profitable cluster damage, side asymmetry.
Answer: does improvement come from removing bad trades or from changing signal coverage profile? Does behavior degrade in important regimes?
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization map exists for all viable variants.
Clear answer on whether improvement is genuine pruning vs coverage shift.

stages.title: Does model layer add anything?
stages.objective: Determine whether ML (logistic/CatBoost) provides meaningful improvement over simple microstructure rules on the best surviving route.
actions: For best surviving route compare: simple bucket rule, threshold rule, logistic baseline, small CatBoost.
Compare only on fixed windows with fixed labels — no wide HPO.
Record: selection_quality, lockbox_quality, extra_value_vs_threshold, complexity_worth_it.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: simple_rule_enough, model_adds_value, or model_not_worth_complexity.

stages.title: Optional gate: early-cut or directional scout
stages.objective: Conditionally open at most one further branch only if v12 has confirmed a result that warrants extension: early-cut gate for confirmed overlay, or directional scout for confirmed replacement.
actions: Evaluate early-cut gate condition: true overlay confirmed or strong watchlist with recognizable early post-entry micro behavior.
Evaluate directional scout gate condition: replacement confirmed or strong watchlist with monotonicity and coherent regime behavior.
Open at most one branch; lock all others.
success_criteria: Lock/unlock decision documented with explicit condition check.
stages.gate_hint: Opens only if at least one track produced confirmed or strong watchlist result. Early-cut requires confirmed overlay + recognizable loser micro-pattern. Directional scout requires confirmed replacement + monotonic regime behavior. At most one branch opens.

stages.title: Final v12 verdict
stages.objective: Deliver honest classification of the microstructure route into one of four statuses: CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY, CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT, WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
actions: Aggregate all evidence from overlay track, replacement track, cannibalization audit, and model assessment.

Classify into: (A) CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY — real veto/filter over @1; (B) CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT — separate layer honestly better than @1; (C) WATCHLIST — signal alive but fragile/impure; (D) REJECTED — result disappears or is economically uninteresting.
Record final route classification and next step in research_memory and research_map.
success_criteria: Final route classification assigned.
Clear documented next step based on verdict.

warnings: Plan is written in Russian; stage titles translated for semantic coherence.
Stage numbering in source starts at ЭТАП 0; mapped to stage_1…stage_11 in output.
Replacement track (stage_7) is semantically gated on overlay track outcome but is staged sequentially for clarity.
Stage 9 (optional gate) depends on a confirmed result from at least one track — if neither track produces anything, v12 proceeds directly to final verdict.
